'use strict'; module.exports = ({onlyFirst = false} = {}) => { const pattern = [ '[\\u001B\\u009B][[\\]()#;?]*(?:(?:(?:(?:;[-a-zA-Z\\d\\/#&.:=?%@~_]+)*|[a-zA-Z\\d]+(?:;[-a-zA-Z\\d\\/#&.:=?%@~_]*)*)?\\u0007)', '(?:(?:\\d{1,4}(?:;\\d{0,4})*)?[\\dA-PR-TZcf-ntqry=><~]))' ].join('|'); return new RegExp(pattern, onlyFirst ? undefined : 'g'); };
